name: Velo CRM
description: Outbound-native CRM for high-velocity sales teams — contacts, deals, pipelines, email sequences, Gmail sync, automations, lead scoring, reports, and a public REST API. React + TypeScript SPA backed by a velo-api Node.js service and Supabase.

VELO_API_URL.label: velo-api backend URL — internal or external URL of the velo-api service (e.g. http://velo-api:3001). Nginx proxies /api/* and /socket.io/* to this address.

post_install.description: Velo CRM is a frontend-only container. It proxies all API calls to the velo-api backend specified in VELO_API_URL. Make sure velo-api (and its Supabase project) are running before opening the app. Register your organisation at /register on first visit.
